youtube.description:
actual schlatt viewer making actual schlatt content

my videos always used to have a schlatt vibe before the larptuber epidemic, and people always told me i look like him (i do not), so why not join in and make it more fun for everyone while providing well made videos

doing this as long as the larp meme stays alive then pivoting back to my main brand where the content will not change tbh i been doing this shit for years.

Main Channel and Twitch- @KiefferLIVE
